sections.title: Used To — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Used To is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + used to + base verb (past habits/states that no longer happen). Rules: 'Used to' describes past habits or states that are no longer true | Same form for all subjects | Negative: did not use to / didn't use to | Question: Did + subject + use to...?
sections.formula: Subject + used to + base verb (past habits/states that no longer happen)

examples.english: I used to go to school daily.
He used to smoke.
We used to live in a village.
She used to play cricket.
They used to study together.
I used to sleep early.

sections.title: Used To — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Used To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + used to + base verb (past habits/states that no longer happen)

examples.hindi: क्या तुम पहले यहाँ रहते थे?
examples.english: Did you use to live here?
He used to be very shy.

examples.hindi: मैं यह गाना बहुत सुनता था।
examples.english: I used to listen to this song a lot.
They used to meet every week.
I used to play football.

examples.hindi: वह पहले बहुत गुस्सा करती थी।
examples.english: She used to get angry a lot.

sections.title: Used To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Used To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Used To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + used to + base verb (past habits/states that no longer happen)

examples.hindi: हम पहले बस से जाते थे।
examples.english: We used to go by bus.
I did not use to do this.
He used to wake up early.
I used to study a lot.

sections.title: Used To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Used To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Used To. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + used to + base verb (past habits/states that no longer happen)

examples.hindi: वे पहले साथ काम करते थे।
examples.english: They used to work together.

examples.hindi: क्या वह पहले यहाँ आता था?
examples.english: Did he use to come here?

examples.hindi: मैं पहले चाय नहीं पीता था।
examples.english: I did not use to drink tea.

examples.hindi: हम पहले हर साल यात्रा करते थे।
examples.english: We used to travel every year.
